description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Wheels that runs on push to specific branches and tags, and on workflow dispatch. The workflow has three jobs: sdist to create a source distribution, wheels to build wheels on multiple platforms, and create_release to create a release with the artifacts. The sdist job checks out the code, sets up Python 3.9 and CMake, installs requirements, runs check-manifest, builds the sdist, and uploads it as an artifact. The wheels job uses a matrix to build wheels on different platforms with different architectures, and uploads the built wheels as artifacts. The create_release job collects the sdist and wheels, and creates a release with the artifacts when a tag is pushed.
